market_regime.interpretation: Call walls are solid resistance. Put walls are solid support. Gamma flip acts as a pivot point. Expect mean reversion.

outlook.volatilityExpectation: Low volatility expected; positive GEX stabilizes market
outlook.summary: Positive total GEX across all expiries indicates a stable market. Bullish reverse smirk in 0DTE and high call volume near 26700 suggest upward momentum pinned by dealer hedging.

levels.motivazione: Massive call volume in 0DTE and Monthly acts as a strong magnet and support just below spot.
Significant call open interest and volume in 0DTE and Monthly creates a firm ceiling above spot.
High put volume in 0DTE establishes a key structural defense level for market makers.
Major call open interest in Monthly and Weekly expiries caps any extreme upside movement.
Heavy call open interest in Monthly and 0DTE provides a solid structural floor.
